response.justification: Maria has strong technical depth, extensive experience with developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, frameworks), and a proven track record of open-source contributions and mentoring, but lacks explicit evidence of people management, team leadership, or organizational change initiatives — key requirements for this Engineering Productivity Manager role.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, code generators)
Proven track record of open-source contributions and technical mentoring through workshops
Broad technical stack across mobile, web, and systems programming with strong automation focus
concerns: No clear evidence of formal people management or team leadership experience
Lacks documented experience leading organizational change or strategic roadmap planning
Mobile platform experience is implied but not explicitly tied to large-scale ecosystem productivity
